text: Okay, we're recording now, and thank you for sending your birth details over. Let me share my screen so you can see the wheel while we talk.

The first thing that jumps out at me is your sun in cancer sitting right at the top of the chart in the tenth house. That's a career story, a public-life story, and it colors everything else we'll look at today.
And your sun is conjunct jupiter, which is honestly one of the luckier signatures I see. There's a bigness to how you show up in your vocation.
Now, you have libra rising, so the ascendant softens all of that cancer intensity. People meet the diplomat first.
But I have to be honest with you: the sun stands in opposition to saturn across the chart. Whatever you build publicly gets tested against the foundations, the family, the private life.
Saturn is in capricorn in your fourth house, together with uranus and neptune. That whole cluster speaks of a home life that had structure and upheaval at the same time.
Let's move to your moon in pisces, down in the sixth house. Your daily routines have to leave room for the tides, for rest, or the body complains.
The moon squares your venus, so there can be friction between what comforts you and what you actually desire. It's workable, but you have to name it.
There's also a lovely trine from the sun to the moon itself, water to water, which smooths a lot of this out over time.
One more thing before the break: pluto in scorpio in the second house. Money and self-worth go through complete transformations in your life, more than once.
We can pick this up again on Sunday if you'd like a follow-up session. Take a breath, stretch, and then we'll talk about the outer planets.
